Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: the user has provided a detailed description of a property onboarding process and wants me to generate targeted open ended questions to clarify and improve understanding

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Let me start by breaking down the process into key stages as outlined in the description

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First the landlord initiates contact followed by document verification by a property coordinator Then property details are recorded and a property manager is assigned based on specific criteria After an introductory meeting photographers and inspectors are scheduled Marketing and activation come next then tenant screening and lease finalization Finally quality checks and audits are performed

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: I need to create questions that uncover missing details decision criteria roles timing sequencing and exception handling

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The questions should be open ended to encourage detailed responses

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: For document verification maybe ask about the criteria for determining missing or outdated documents

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: For property manager assignment what specific metrics or data points are used to evaluate workload and suitability

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Regarding the introductory meeting how are special conditions documented and communicated to other stakeholders

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Inspections and repairs might have exceptions or delays so asking about how those are managed would be good

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Marketing and activation steps could have variations based on property type or market trends

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Tenant screening criteria and handling multiple applicants need clarification

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Quality checks and audits might reveal compliance issues so questions about how those findings are addressed

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Also consider how exceptions are handled throughout such as special insurance or custom lease clauses

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Communication tracking across different teams and tools is important too

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Maybe ask about integration between systems and how data discrepancies are resolved

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Need to ensure each question is targeted and open ended avoiding yes no answers

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Let me draft questions that delve into each phase focusing on decision points stakeholder interactions and process variations
